summary: Tested Settings tabs reorganization: Interventions tab, Student Data tab Absence Type Configuration, MTSS & Screening tab content separation, and backend attendance/settings APIs. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test admin user 'test.settings@example.com' with session token via mongosh
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features tested and passing. Settings page loads correctly with 9 tabs. Interventions tab shows intervention library with add/remove. Student Data tab shows Absence Type Configuration with toggles (attendance data already loaded). MTSS & Screening has NO intervention library or absence types. Backend /api/attendance/types returns {types, excluded_types}. PUT /api/settings with excluded_absence_types and intervention_types both persist correctly.
